title: Portrait
description: Two-layer model of the interlocutor (theory of mind), plus the style profile and the long-term part. The interpretive layer and the style profile carry confidence. Non-diagnostic; not a dossier.

confidence.description: Rises with confirmation, decays over time.

interpretive.description: Hypotheses about the user's own facets. Initially nearly empty; grown by the background pass with inertia.

name.description: e.g. Analyst, Nurturer, Vulnerable Child, Critic, Defender.

observation.description: Non-diagnostic note about a pattern, not a clinical label.

evidence_refs.description: Material observation ids supporting this hypothesis.

style_profile.description: Moving average of the user's delivery features; drives the Layer 4 envelope.

long_term.description: The durable part of the portrait; its confidence decays faster without reconfirmation.
